# services.vikunja

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.vikunja`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.vikunja.address` | `string` | The IP address to bind to. |
| `services.vikunja.database.database` | `string` | Database name. |
| `services.vikunja.database.host` | `string` | Database host address. Can also be a socket. |
| `services.vikunja.database.path` | `string` | Path to the sqlite3 database file. |
| `services.vikunja.database.type` | `one of "sqlite", "mysql", "postgres"` | Database engine to use. |
| `services.vikunja.database.user` | `string` | Database user. |
| `services.vikunja.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable vikunja service. |
| `services.vikunja.environmentFiles` | `list of absolute path` | List of environment files set in the vikunja systemd service. For example passwords should be set in one of these files. |
| `services.vikunja.frontendHostname` | `string` | The Hostname under which the frontend is running. |
| `services.vikunja.frontendScheme` | `one of "http", "https"` | Whether the site is available via http or https. |
| `services.vikunja.package` | `package` | The vikunja package to use. |
| `services.vikunja.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The TCP port exposed by the API. |
| `services.vikunja.settings` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Vikunja configuration. Refer to <https://vikunja.io/docs/config-options/> for details on supported values. |
